name: Python 3
updateContentCommand:
[ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; pip3 install --user streamlit; mkdir -p .streamlit static; echo -e '[server]
enableStaticServing = true' > .streamlit/config.toml; [ ! -f static/sitemap.xml ] && echo -e '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap.0.9">
 <url>
  <loc>https://your-app-link.streamlit.app/</loc>
  <priority>1.0</priority>
 </url>
</urlset>' > static/sitemap.xml; echo '✅ Packages installed, Config set, and Folders created'
